overall.description: A nighttime walk along a wet suburban road in a GTA V game environment, passing a chain-link fence and approaching a red Coca-Cola delivery truck parked outside an industrial market building. The scene features realistic wet pavement reflections, atmospheric street lighting, and moody cloud-covered skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: fenced roadside adjacent to commercial loading area

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet roadside next to a chain-link fence, approaching a parked delivery truck

entered.detail: tall metal chain-link fence running parallel to the road on the left side
red delivery truck with Coca-Cola branding parked near the market building
large white industrial warehouse-style building with red trim
tall street lamp illuminating the road and fence area
tall palm trees lining the right side of the road against the night sky

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk along a wet asphalt road at night, bordered by a chain-link fence on the left and palm trees on the right. A red Coca-Cola delivery truck is visible ahead near an industrial market building, with street lamps providing artificial illumination. The environment is quiet with no pedestrians or moving vehicles present.

scene_state.functional_zone: open market parking and loading area

events.description: passing the end of the chain-link fence into the open commercial area

agents.ego_description: continuing forward toward the parked delivery truck and market building entrance

entered.detail: red 'MARKET' signage on the white facade of the industrial building

segments.scene_description: Having passed the fenced section, the view opens into a wider commercial area. The red Coca-Cola truck is now closer on the left, and the 'MARKET' signage on the industrial building becomes clearly visible. The chain-link fence has fallen behind, revealing more of the building's facade and the parking area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person walk along a wet suburban road that transitions from a narrow fenced corridor into an open industrial parking area. It begins by moving past a chain-link fence and palm trees under the artificial glow of street lamps, with a red Coca-Cola delivery truck visible in the distance. As the camera advances, the fenced section falls behind and the view expands into a wider commercial space. The scene then shifts focus toward the industrial market building, bringing the red truck closer on the left as the market signage becomes clearly visible against the building's facade.
